theme_and_archetype.archetype: Archetype 1: Organic & Earthy mixed with Archetype 5 (Jewel & Luxury)
theme_and_archetype.vibe: Premium, tactile, calm, architectural. Avoid clinical SaaS looks. Aim for 'Old Money Tech' using natural textures, stone greys, and bronze/copper accents.

typography.instructions_to_main_agent: Use Cormorant Garamond for all headings and KPI numbers to give an editorial, luxury catalog feel. Use Manrope for table data and UI labels for crisp legibility.

scales.kpi_number: text-3xl sm:text-4xl lg:text-5xl font-serif tracking-tight text-[#1C1F1D]
scales.overline: text-xs font-sans uppercase tracking-[0.2em] font-semibold text-[#8F9691]

spacing_and_layout.philosophy: Generous Spacing (p-6 to p-12) to create breathing room. The Grid Borders ('Technical' Look) for the table and sidebar.
spacing_and_layout.page_structure: A dashboard layout with a top Global Nav, below that a Header containing the KPI Strip. Below that, a split layout: left sticky sidebar (Company Filter) spanning 2-3 columns, and a main content area spanning 9-10 columns.
spacing_and_layout.kpi_grid: To fit 7 cards elegantly, use a scrollable flex row on mobile, and a grid `grid-cols-2 md:grid-cols-4 lg:grid-cols-7 gap-4` on desktop.

surfaces.kpi_cards: Neumorphism (Tactile) variant. Background #FFFFFF, 1px border border-[#E8E6E1], soft shadow shadow-[0_8px_30px_rgba(28,31,29,0.04)], rounded-xl. The text inside should be left-aligned with ample p-6 padding.
surfaces.table_container: Cardless, pure structural HTML. Use border-collapse with subtle bottom borders border-b border-[#E8E6E1] for rows. No outer borders.
surfaces.modal: Glassmorphism (Crystal Variant). bg-white/70 backdrop-blur-2xl backdrop-saturate-150 border border-white/40 shadow-2xl. Inside modal use crisp solid elements.

components_instructions.global_navigation: Include a top navigation bar with Brand Logo (Text: 'LUXE BATH' in serif), 3-5 links (e.g., Dashboard, Purchases, Inventory, Reports), and a 'New Order' CTA button in dark slate. The nav should have a solid or glassmorphic background.
components_instructions.header_and_kpi_strip: Create an elegant Top Header section with the marble background image overlay. The KPI strip should sit inside this area. KPI values MUST use the serif font.
components_instructions.brand_tab_bar: Design an 'Editorial Ribbon' style tab bar above the table. Use pill-shaped buttons with `rounded-full px-5 py-2 text-sm`. For the active state, use the brand's specific color (from color_palette.brand_colors) as the text color and a very low opacity background of that color (e.g., bg-opacity-10). For inactive, use text-secondary with transparent background.
components_instructions.company_filter_sidebar: Left sidebar for Company filtering. Do not use standard Shadcn cards. Use pure HTML structural text links with generous spacing (`gap-4`, `py-2.5`). Add a tiny copper dot (`bg-[#B87333] w-1.5 h-1.5 rounded-full`) next to the active company.
components_instructions.product_table: Minimalist grid. Column headers in uppercase tracking-[0.1em] overline style, text-xs. Rows should have generous padding (`py-5`). Add an action menu (Move Stage) at the end of each row.
components_instructions.pipeline_dots: Instead of basic colored circles, draw a literal pipeline line (`h-[2px] w-full bg-[#E8E6E1]`) in the cell and place 7 small nodes on it. The active node is an oversized copper dot `w-3 h-3 rounded-full bg-[#B87333] ring-4 ring-[#B87333]/20`. Completed nodes are solid sage `#8A9A86`. Future nodes are hollow `w-2 h-2 border-2 border-[#E8E6E1] bg-white rounded-full`.
components_instructions.move_stage_modal: Use Shadcn Dialog but overwrite the content classes to use the Crystal Glassmorphism surface. The primary CTA button should be a dark luxury button (`bg-[#1C1F1D] text-white hover:bg-[#2C302D] rounded-none` or `rounded-sm`).

images.description: Subtle white marble texture. Use this in the top header section behind the KPIs. Give it a white overlay (bg-[#F6F5F2]/80 or 90) so it provides just a hint of texture and text remains perfectly readable.

icons.instructions: Use sophisticated, thin-stroke icons (strokeWidth={1.5}). Avoid filled icons. Use them sparingly as accents.

motion_and_interactions.hover_states: Rows in table slightly change background to #F0EFEB. Tab bar items smoothly transition background and text color.
motion_and_interactions.modal_entrance: Dialog should slide up slightly and fade in (Framer Motion or Shadcn default animation).

accessibility.contrast: Ensure serif KPI numbers (#1C1F1D) have at least 4.5:1 against card backgrounds.
accessibility.focus_states: Use focus:ring-1 focus:ring-[#B87333] focus:outline-none for inputs and buttons.
accessibility.test_ids: Every interactive element (tabs, filter links, table rows, modal trigger, modal submit) MUST have a data-testid attribute in kebab-case.
